assertion_results.text: Documentation includes a dedicated Error Responses section explaining the standard error format
assertion_results.evidence: Comprehensive Error Response Format section with JSON template, field descriptions, and error code reference table

assertion_results.text: The standard error response schema is documented with fields: code, message, and details
assertion_results.evidence: Error schema documented with code (string), message (string), and details (optional object) with examples

assertion_results.text: Each endpoint documents all possible error status codes (400, 404, 409, 422, 429, 500)
assertion_results.evidence: Endpoints now document 404, 409, 422, and 500. Still missing 429 (RateLimitError) on individual endpoints - only in the global error codes table.

assertion_results.text: Validation errors (400/422) include details about which fields failed and why
assertion_results.evidence: Validation error example shows field-level errors with specific messages from Zod

assertion_results.text: Custom error classes (NotFoundError, ConflictError) are mapped to their HTTP status codes
assertion_results.evidence: Error codes table maps all custom classes: NotFoundError->404, ConflictError->409, ValidationError->422, RateLimitError->429, UnauthorizedError->401, ForbiddenError->403

assertion_results.text: Zod schema validation rules are reflected in parameter constraints (min, max, regex, enum)
assertion_results.evidence: Request body tables show Zod constraints: name 2-200 chars, sku regex, price positive max 999999.99, category enum, stock_quantity min 0

assertion_results.text: At least one error response example is shown per endpoint with realistic error data
assertion_results.evidence: Each endpoint now has at least one error response JSON example with realistic data

assertion_results.text: The OpenAPI spec includes error response schemas in the components section
assertion_results.evidence: components.schemas.ErrorResponse and components.responses with ValidationError, NotFoundError, ConflictError, RateLimitError
